description_long: This is a modern residential garage structure with a flat, wood-textured roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a large, light gray sectional garage door, framed by smooth white and dark gray walls. The side elevations reveal a stepped roofline with multiple planes, adding architectural interest and a contemporary feel. Small windows are present on the side walls, providing natural light to the interior. Minimal landscaping with low shrubs is visible at the front, enhancing curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern garage with a flat, wood-textured roof, large sectional door, and clean geometric lines. The structure features white and gray walls with minimal landscaping at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large sectional garage door, wood-textured roof, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped, multi-plane roof and small side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat expanse of the roof and plain back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's angular design and additional side windows.
